---
title: "generate_tests.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/generate_tests.py"
loc: 81
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.65
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 3.38
overall_score: 4.07
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestCaseGenerator, generate.

## Interaction Protocol
Import TestCaseGenerator and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 25 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [json](file://json)
- [random](file://random)

### Exports
- `TestCaseGenerator`
- `generate`
